'''Azurite''' was a [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] found on [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]].

Less valuable than [[ionite]] and [[Mining/Legends|mined]] by several companies including [[Offworld Mining Corporation]], it was blue in [[Color/Legends|color]], and used mainly for ornamentation. For example, the [[Singing Mountain Clan]] on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] possessed decorations which [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] believed to be made of azurite.

{{Substance-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the real world, [[Wikipedia:Azurite|azurite]]<ref name="AzuriteBritannica">{{WebCite|url=https://www.britannica.com/science/azurite|text=Azurite | Deep Blue, Copper Ore, Malachite|author=The Editors of Encyclopædia Britannica|date=2018-02-23|work=[[Wikipedia:Encyclopædia Britannica|''Encyclopædia Britannica'']]|archivedate=20240614081346}}</ref> is a blue-colored,<ref name="CarbonateBritannica">{{WebCite|url=https://www.britannica.com/science/carbonate-mineral|text=Carbonate mineral | Types, Properties & Uses|author=The Editors of Encyclopædia Britannica|date=2017-12-19|work=[[Wikipedia:Encyclopædia Britannica|''Encyclopædia Britannica'']]|archivedate=20240525092609}}</ref> [[Wikipedia:Copper|copper]]-containing [[Wikipedia:Mineral|mineral]].<ref name="AzuriteBritannica" />
